markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Calibrate content quality and align on Brex's specific standards.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Quality Gaps:** Recent articles show clear AI patterns (repetitive citations, unnatural flow), factual errors ("hallucinations"), and poor SEO structure (no internal links, incorrect header hierarchy).](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - **Critical Misalignment on Competitors:** Listicle content is too positive, highlighting competitor strengths (e.g., G2 \#1 rankings, enterprise logos) that undermine Brex's value proposition and risk sending leads to rivals.
  - [**Brex's Editing Style:** Jon's edits improve flow by adding authority, situational examples, and a confident tone to remove the "AI sound." This specific style is now the required standard.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Path Forward:** GrowthX will schedule a follow-up to systematically translate this feedback into training and process updates, aiming to reduce Brex's editing time.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)

## Topics

### Content Quality & SEO Gaps

  - [**AI-Generated Feel:** The writing is unnatural, with repetitive citations (e.g., one source cited 7x) and generic meta titles ("Target Keyword in 2026 Guide").](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=154.0)
  - [**Factual Errors:** Articles contained "hallucinations" (9–10 in one), requiring significant fact-checking.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=532.0)
  - [**Poor SEO Structure:**](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)
      - [**Header Hierarchy:** Incorrect (e.g., using bold text instead of H2/H3 tags), which harms search engine and AI model visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
      - [**Internal Linking:** Non-existent, a key process step.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=492.0)
      - [**Keyword Cannibalization:** Targeting keywords that compete with existing Brex content.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**SERP Analysis:** A recent Google update (Dec) shifted rankings to favor product pages over articles for some keywords.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1953.0)
      - [**Action:** GrowthX must analyze the SERP for each target keyword to determine if an article can realistically rank in the top 10 or if the goal is purely AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

### Deep Dive: "Best Software for Automated Reconciliation" (Listicle)

  - [**Competitor Framing:** The article's primary flaw is its overly positive framing of competitors, which undermines Brex's position.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=878.0)
      - [**Example:** Highlighting a competitor's "number one rankings on multiple G2 grids" or listing their enterprise customers (Lululemon, DoorDash) provides social proof that could send leads to rivals.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [**Required Standard:** Competitor descriptions must be neutral, focusing on features without recommending the product or listing impressive customer logos.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)
  - [**Brex's "Cons" Section:** The listed cons are problematic.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
      - [**Example:** "Focuses primarily on spend management rather than standalone reconciliation" directly contradicts the article's purpose.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1074.0)
      - [**Required Standard:** Brex's "cons" must align with its established messaging (e.g., "not for very small businesses").](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1028.0)
  - [**Header Structure:** The article's product descriptions use bold text instead of proper H2/H3 tags, which is an SEO error.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=977.0)
  - [**Content Flow:** The article abruptly ends after the product list, lacking a proper conclusion.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)

### Deep Dive: "How to Conduct a Burn Rate Analysis" & "Days Cash on Hand"

  - [**Burn Rate Analysis:** The article's main issue was its repetitive citation style, which made it read like a summary of another site.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [**Days Cash on Hand:** This article was a good example of Jon's editing style.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1411.0)
      - [**Process:** Jon's edits took \~30–40 minutes, focusing on improving flow and removing the "AI sound."](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1760.0)
      - [**Outcome:** The edits added authority, situational examples, and a more confident tone.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Required Standard:** This editing style is the new benchmark for all content.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**External Linking Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [**Problem:** Articles link to external sites that compete directly with Brex's own content (e.g., an article on startup runway).](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)
      - [**Required Standard:** Avoid linking to direct competitors. For data citations, GrowthX should first check if Brex has its own authoritative content on the topic.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1525.0)

### Process & Tooling Updates

  - [**Sanity CMS:** The current Sanity setup is inefficient for marketers. Aida will provide feedback based on a more user-friendly client implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Image Workflow:** Jon will now use the cover images attached in Airtable.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)
      - [**Note:** Brex's brand team may provide image prompts for GrowthX to follow in the future.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2226.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
      - [Schedule a follow-up meeting with Jon to systematically review more articles and translate feedback into training.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1907.0)
      - [Share this meeting recording with the team to communicate the new quality standards.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2272.0)
      - [Ensure all editors analyze SERPs for target keywords before writing.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=1944.0)
      - [Provide feedback to Jon on the Sanity CMS setup.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [**Brex:**](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
      - [Jon will provide keywords for an upcoming content sprint.](https://fathom.video/share/ApCKbyN8wmStznYPE6BSe7mvBBRS58UW?tab=summary&timestamp=2351.0)
